case_title: SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENCE CLUB, INC. VS. MARK R COLLINS et al

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENCE CLUB, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, MARK R DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
